data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of adding/removing options after launch, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this capability, yet the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the ability to add or remove options post-launch. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence needed to support the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the ability to add/remove options after launch.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the ability to add/remove options after launch.
